who: HR departments in small marketing agencies using Gusto for payroll processing 5–15 employees
offer: For HR departments in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 employees, compliance gaps cause penalties and fines. We provide compliance monitoring instead of manual tracking of compliance requirements.
problem: Ensuring payroll compliance with changing regulations
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR departments seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on compliance tools
DM outreach to HR departments with demo video
Participate in community forums for HR tool sharing
try_it: Let users try Compliance checklist for payroll and summary report
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing payroll data
Allow one-click export of compliance reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
